back: It carries out arithmetic calculations and logical operations.

front: Give one example of an arithmetic operation carried out by the ALU.
Give one example of a logical operation carried out by the ALU.
back: Comparisons such as greater than, less than or equal to.

front: What does the control unit do?
back: It controls and coordinates the operations of the CPU and the rest of the computer.

front: Which part of the CPU controls the fetch-decode-execute cycle?
Which part of the CPU executes calculations?
How do the ALU and control unit work together?
back: The control unit manages and directs operations, and the ALU performs the calculations and logic.
